source_pr.title: infoschema: fix unstable test TestTableIfHasColumn

symptoms: TestTableIfHasColumn is unstable because it relies on the slow-log file path from global config; using the default slow log filename can conflict with other tests or not point to the prepared file.
failure_signature: TestTableIfHasColumn: slow-log/infoschema assertions fail due to SlowQueryFile config mismatch (default `tidb-slow.log` shared across tests)
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by shared global configuration/state: the test writes a slow log file but (without explicitly updating the global SlowQueryFile) TiDB may read from the default slow log path, which is shared across tests. The fix uses unique slow-log filenames, updates the global config (Log.SlowQueryFile) to point to the intended file, and restores the global config after the test to avoid cross-test interference.
fix_pattern: Use unique slow-log filenames and update/restore global SlowQueryFile config in tests to avoid shared-file interference.

evidence: evidence: infoschema: fix unstable test TestTableIfHasColumn
